name: Christmas Boxes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut out and bake 5 squares of the same size for each box.
2. Cut one larger square for the top.
3. Trim all edges to be square.
4. Use confectioners' icing to "glue" 4 squares together for the sides.
5. Trim the 5th square for the bottom and glue it in place with icing.
6. Trim the larger square so it sits on top.
7. Roll out square gumdrops in sugar until thin, then cut into shapes.
8. Attach the shaped gumdrops to the box using icing.
9. Optionally, put small goodies like other little cookies inside before gluing the top on.
10. Glue the top of the box onto the structure.
11. The kids love these little surprises!
